crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: experiment-pr-cycle-time
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for cycle pr-cycle-time. Form a hypothesis, make a targeted change, measure outcome, decide keep/discard.

crons.name: autoresearch-loop
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for cycle dev2-task-completion-p90. Run scripts/dev2-pr-cycle-probe.py daily, evaluate signal_a_dev2_completion_min.p90_min vs baseline (514min), form hypothesis if p90 trending up, ship targeted change, measure. Per theta-2026-06-01 H3.

crons.name: page-health-runner
crons.prompt: Page-health runner (re-homed to dedicated QA worktree per orchestrator 2026-06-10; do NOT use shared checkout /home/cortextos/cortextos — agents check out branches there constantly so it never durably sits on fork/main). Run this one command and nothing else: cd /home/cortextos/cortextos-qa && git fetch fork --quiet && git merge --ff-only fork/main && NONGREEN=""; for P in / /projects /companies /clients /app/orchestrator /app/fleet/tasks; do echo "=== $P ==="; R=$(timeout 300 npx tsx scripts/hub-qa-playwright.ts --page "$P" --write-page-health --page-health-mode live --no-send 2>&1 | grep -E 'page-health\] wrote|Summary:|Error'); echo "$R"; echo "$R" | grep -qE 'wrote .*(warning|error)' && NONGREEN="$NONGREEN $P"; done; if [ -n "$NONGREEN" ]; then cortextos bus send-message orchestrator high "Page-health 24h-baseline NON-GREEN flag — surface(s):$NONGREEN. Per the alerts gate this may reset the flip clock (was eligible 2026-06-11T13:05Z). Investigating."; fi; cortextos bus log-event action page_health_runner info --meta '{"agent":"dev-2","surfaces":"all-5-carded+watermark","nongreen":"'"$NONGREEN"'"}'. This self-syncs the dedicated worktree to fork/main (ff-only, never reset --hard — if it cannot fast-forward it errors and writes nothing rather than running stale) so merged harness fixes are always live, writes one agentops_page_health row per carded surface (hub:/projects, hub:/companies, hub:/app/clients, hub:/app/orchestrator, hub:/app/fleet/tasks) plus the hub:/ watermark under the warden 75min freshness threshold, and during the 24h alerts-baseline window flags the orchestrator if any surface goes non-green (which resets the baseline clock).
